name: Travala Booking
description: Travala hotel booking integration with MCP and skills — by GoPlausible

setup.summary: Sync workspace memory, register travala-mcp (remote, http) and algorand-mcp (headless stdio, via npx) with mcporter, and add the plugin to OpenClaw's allow list.

postSetup.message: Restart the OpenClaw gateway to apply changes. travala-mcp and algorand-mcp are auto-registered in ~/.mcporter/mcporter.json on first load. Hotel payment uses x402 micropayments (USDC/ALGO) via the headless Algorand MCP server (npx @goplausible/algorand-mcp), which exposes make_http_request_with_x402 — no GUI and no env vars required. Fund the agent wallet to enable payment.
